question: Deploy DinoBrain Observatory design branch to GitHub/update flow. Need context on version/release alignment, private repo, installer AppRef, and prior deployment commands.

items.title: Task: Implement a design-only DinoBrain Observatory graph redesign from the provided dinosaur-shaped g

Kept OS/MCP/SQLite/hook/data logic unchanged; updated only the Observatory visual layout/rendering CSS and browser-side canvas layout. items.summary: status=partial | project=dinobrain | Played back the design-only brief for a high-quality DinoBrain Observatory graph redesign based on the provided dinosaur-shaped graph image. No files were changed. Product Design user-context preflight could not run because python/python3 resolves to WindowsApps shim without a local Python runtime, but the supplied image is a concrete visual source.

items.title: Task: Add installer flow that detects running Codex, restarts or guides reload, and opens/launches a h
items.summary: status=completed | project=dinobrain | Implemented a post-install Codex hook approval flow. The installer now creates DinoBrain Codex Hook Approval.cmd and launches it after hook registration unless skipped. The helper detects stale Codex desktop processes, restarts/reopens Codex, copies /hooks to the clipboard, and shows instructions while preserving the requirement that the user manually trusts the hook. Added shared graph health generation at .dino/index/graph-health.json, wired it into SQLite index refresh and memory audit snapshots, expanded Observatory with health chips, read trace, node lifecycle, sync risk, and graph-health API, added graph health verification, bumped app/installer/client versions to

items.title: Task: task-20260703-041404-Re-check-why-GitHub-Release-
items.summary: status=completed | Rechecked GitHub release upload after the user noted GitHub updates had worked previously. Found the earlier miss: git credential fill did not expose credentials, but git credential-manager get did return the GitHub token for the logged-in clockmansy account. Used that token only in-process to run npm run release:win -- -Tag v0.1.3 -ReplaceAsset. Created the GitHub release, uploaded DinoBrainSetup.
